subject: Lugia — a large white avian legendary creature with wing-like appendages soaring above churning ocean waves
description: A massive white creature with long wing-like extensions and a streamlined body surges upward through a burst of turbulent water and white foam. The figure is pale and sleek with blue-tinted underside markings, rendered against a dynamic backdrop of crashing blue-white ocean waves and spray. The composition captures an upward-surging motion as the creature breaks the ocean surface or soars just above it. The mood is mythic and elemental.
foreground: Large white avian creature rising through ocean spray and foam
background: Churning blue-white ocean waves and water spray
